questionText: API latency is variable & app is sluggish. How do you design UI safely?

whatWorkedWell: Clear understanding of the problem and constraints
Proposed debouncing and caching strategies upfront
Discussed user feedback mechanisms for slow requests
Considered edge cases like network timeouts
overallTakeaways: Focus on perceived performance, not just actual latency
Use skeleton screens and progressive loading
Implement request cancellation for stale queries
Monitor and alert on API response time metrics

keyMoments.description: Interviewer asked about handling slow API responses
Suggested debouncing user input to reduce API calls
Discussion about caching strategies and invalidation
Talked about implementing retry logic with exponential backoff
Covered showing loading states and skeleton screens
